content.en:
"When is the general offensive going on?"

The Ancestor of Destruction asked.

"After thousands of years, summon back those Peerless Domain Ancestors who are roaming in the Dark Forbidden Domain, but the Peerless Domain Ancestors and Half-Step Ancestors hidden by our forces should also send a batch, and when the time comes, we will go all out to attack the Silent Annihilation Clan. Our mission is to kill the Silent Annihilation Clan with more than seven patterns, and the task of the Half-Step Ancestor and the Peerless Domain Ancestor is to kill the Silent Annihilation Clan with one pattern to six patterns. "

The Holy Ancestor proposed.

"I don't have any opinions!"

The Eternal Master spoke.

The Eternal Sect Master is the ancestor of the Eternal Sect, and it is also comparable to the top of the Eight-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan, although it is not as good as the Nine-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan, but it has a unique method, and it is difficult for even the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor to kill the Eternal Sect Master.

"In addition, there is no need to leak out about our deliberate non-harvesting of the Silent Annihilation Clan, we just need to say that we now have the strength of the Ancestor to break through, and we have surpassed the Silent Annihilation Clan, and we are ready to launch a counterattack. Some half-step ancestors and non-superior domain ancestors may have guessed it, or maybe some ancestors have revealed the news, but no matter what, as long as they don't say it, the non-superior domain ancestors will still fight hard and will not withdraw at a critical moment. "

Destroy the Ancestral Dao.

"No problem!"

Jiezu nodded.

In this way, their six ancestors arranged a plan to invade the Silent Annihilation Clan.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

this day.

A large number of Peerless Domain Ancestors poured into the Sacred Domain Continent and the Destruction Continent, and one Ancestor after another appeared.

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

He sensed more ancestral aura than usual, and many Peerless Domain Ancestors came, even the Fire Emblem War Ancestor also came here, as if it was forcibly recruited.

"Ten Thousand Law War Ancestor!"

"Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor!"

Ye Tian greeted the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor.

Immediately, he greeted several new Superior Domain Ancestors from the Battle Gate.

At this moment, the voices of the ancestors came into the minds of a peerless domain ancestor.

"A hundred years later, invade the territory of the Silent Annihilation!"

"A hundred years later, invade the territory of the Silent Annihilation!"

"A hundred years later, invade the territory of the Silent Annihilation!"

Hearing this voice, Ye Tian was a little confused.

Many of the Superior Domain Ancestors were also stunned, they were going to invade the Silent Annihilation Clan?

What a joke!

Aren't they the weak, aren't the Silent Annihilations their nightmare?

Even the ancestors are just barely able to compete with the seven-pattern and eight-pattern Silent Annihilation Clan, and the Silent Annihilation Clan has to be nine-veined and almost invincible!

But now, the Ancestors have decided to invade the Silent Clan.

With such a dozen, how many of their peerless domain ancestors would have to die?

Immediately, many Peerless Domain Ancestors reported the situation to the Ancestors, saying that this was too risky.

And the ancestors gave all the Superior Domain Ancestors a statement, that is, several Ancestors had made a new breakthrough, and now the Ancestors' combat power was definitely stronger than that of the Silent Annihilation Clan.

Moreover, the ancestors mobilized a large number of peerless domain ancestors to come over, preparing to fight with all their might, and the success rate of destroying the Silent Annihilation Clan was more than ninety percent.

In this way, the Superior Domain Ancestor did not object much.

After all, once the Silence Extinction Clan is really destroyed, they will not need to guard this place in the future, and they will not need to face the Silence Clan for endless years, and they can enjoy a better life.

It's too boring here, and no one of the Superior Domain Ancestors wants to guard here, but the orders of the Ancestors, they can't resist, so they must obey them.

Now, ninety percent of the hope of extinguishing the Silent Clan, naturally I have to try it.

---------------------

A hundred years later.

One Ancestor after another stood at the forefront, followed by a large number of Superior Domain Ancestors, where many forces of the Dark Sacred Domain gathered Supreme Domain Ancestors, the Destruction Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain, and many Evil Clan Superior Domain Ancestors, as well as the Eternal Sect Superior Domain Ancestors, some idle Superior Domain Ancestor level forbidden creatures in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and so on.

With such a huge force, almost all of the combat power of the Dark Forbidden Domain has been gathered.

"Across the corridor of time and space, invade the Silent Clan!"

The Holy Ancestor spoke.

Rumble!!!!!

A large number of Ancestors and Peerless Domain Ancestors crossed the space-time corridor and came to the territory of the Silent Annihilation Clan for the first time.

The annihilation energy here is very strong, and it is very disadvantageous for the ancestors of the Peerless Domain to fight here.

But if it's a short fight, the impact is not too great.

And for Ye Tian, this place is like a treasure.

Now.

The Silent Annihilators guarding the space-time corridor were stunned, they never expected that the creatures of the Dark Forbidden Realm would dare to invade their great Silent Annihilation territory.

As a result, support did not arrive in time.

Boom Boom Boom !!!!

One of the Silent Exterminators was exterminated, and one of the Seven Patterns Extinction Clan was killed in an instant by the Destruction Saint Ancestor and the two Great Ancestors of the Holy Ancestor.

Such a strong man comparable to the ancestor didn't even escape, and fell and died in an instant.

"Such a powerful Destruction Ancestor and Saint Ancestor actually killed a Seven Pattern Silence Annihilation Clan in an instant!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

It's not like he didn't do nothing, and when he invaded here, his copying talent enveloped this place, copying all the talents of the Silent Annihilation.

After all, once the Silent Annihilation Clan was destroyed, there would be no way to copy their talents, so now they can copy it once and slowly merge it back.

The territory of the Annihilation is like a time and space, and each time and space is a territory, some of which are weaker and some of which are stronger.

And there are tens of thousands of territories here, so you can imagine how many Silent Extinction Clans there are, and the number is much more than that of the Peerless Domain Ancestors and Ancestors.

However.

The Ancestor of Destruction took out a black long sword and slashed it with one sword, instantly destroying one territory after another, and I don't know how many Destroyers died under this sword.

"Ancestor of Destruction, you are looking for death, dare to invade our territory of the Silent Annihilation Clan, and kill so many of our clansmen!"

An angry roar was heard.

Rumble!!!!!

A nine-striped Silent Annihilation has arrived.

He is the patriarch of the Silent Annihilation Clan, and now the strongest person of the Silent Annihilation Clan, Silence!

Silence turned into a terrifying figure hundreds of billions of feet high, and grabbed a peerless domain ancestor with one hand, and seemed to want to kill a group of peerless domain ancestors.

However, the Ancestor of Destruction and the Holy Ancestor teamed up to stop the silence and pull it into another space-time battle.

And the Realm Ancestor, the Eternal Sect Master, the Time and Space Master, and several other powerhouses comparable to the Eight Patterns of Silence Annihilation also took action and fought against the Eight Patterns of Silence Annihilation.

As for the ancestor of the rank of War Ancestor, he fought with the Seven Patterns Silent Annihilation Clan.

A shocking battle has begun!
